description_long: This is a spherical pendant lamp with a smooth, frosted white glass globe forming the main body. The top section is capped with a metallic, dark gray or black fixture that connects to a thin suspension cable, suggesting it is designed to hang from a ceiling. The glass globe is opaque, diffusing light softly and evenly, while the metallic cap provides a modern, industrial accent. The cable is slender and unobtrusive, emphasizing the clean, minimalist design. There are no visible seams, switches, or decorative embellishments, giving the lamp a sleek and contemporary appearance. The overall form is simple and functional, suitable for urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A spherical pendant lamp with a frosted white glass globe and a dark metallic cap, suspended by a thin cable. Its minimalist, modern design is both functional and stylish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full roundness of the frosted glass globe and the metallic cap with the cable attachment centered above.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, highlighting the symmetry and smooth surface of the globe and cap.
description_view_2: Another side view, maintaining the same features with no visible seams or changes, emphasizing the uniformity of the lamp.
description_view_3: Rear view, visually indistinguishable from the front and sides, reinforcing the lamp's spherical and symmetrical design.
